text: Last class you went shopping for clothes and colors.
Today you feel sick and you need help.
I feel sick. Can you help me?
Good afternoon. How can I help you?
I feel sick. I have a headache. Can you help me?
I am sorry. Do you also have a fever?
A little. And my stomach hurts too.
Take this medicine, one tablet two times a day. If you do not feel better, see a doctor.
Thank you very much. You are very kind.
I need to see a doctor.

Good afternoon, and welcome to the pharmacy. How can I help you today? If you feel sick, please tell me your symptoms. Do you have a headache, or does your stomach hurt? For a headache, we have these small tablets. Take one tablet with water, two times a day. For a fever, we have this medicine in a bottle. Take one spoon in the morning and one spoon at night. If you have pain, do not take more than the bottle says. Please rest and drink a lot of water. If you do not feel better in two days, you must see a doctor. Take care, and feel better soon.

Hi Marlene, this is Sofia. I am a little worried about you. You said you feel sick and you have a headache. Please drink some water and rest in your room today. Do not go out in the cold. There is a pharmacy near the hotel, on the corner. If your stomach still hurts tomorrow, we should see a doctor together. I can go with you, do not worry. Send me a message tonight and tell me how you feel. I hope you feel better soon. Take care, my friend.

First, you feel sick and you have a headache. Then you find a pharmacy near the hotel. After that, you tell the pharmacist your symptoms. Next, you buy the medicine and ask how to take it. Finally, you go back to your room to rest and drink water.
I need medicine for my fever.
If I am very sick, I see a doctor.
I feel sick. Can you help me?
I need to see a doctor.
